etymology.description: Depicts a person (大) wearing feathered or horned headdress (now 羊) -> 美 (mĕi, 'beautiful') variant
etymology.interpretation: 𡵂 is a variant of 美 (mĕi, 'beautiful'), originally depicting a person adorned with a large headdress of feathers or ram's horns. The headdress symbolizes adornment or embellishment, giving the idea of beauty or elegance through decorative attire.
